primarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
primarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
sources.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

sources.label: Vegas Regional Qualifier summary page
sources.description: Community summary page used to recover structured legend rows and fallback deck slugs.

eventPrimarySource.label: Vegas’ Top Decks
eventPrimarySource.description: RQ Vegas’ 1600 players yielded some new looks at the best decks in Riftbound.

decklistSource.label: Teemo official best-of decklist
decklistSource.description: Decklist parsed directly from the official Riot/Riftbound event recap.

resolvedCard.name: Dr. Mundo - Expert
resolvedCard.effect:
My Might is increased by the number of cards in your trash.
At the start of your Beginning Phase, recycle 3 from your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Ezreal - Prodigy
resolvedCard.effect:
When you play me, discard 1, then draw 2.
Optional additional costs you pay cost :rb_energy_1: or :rb_rune_rainbow: less.

resolvedCard.name: Fizz - Trickster
resolvedCard.effect: When you play me, you may play a spell from your trash with Energy cost no more than :rb_energy_3:, ignoring its Energy cost. Recycle that spell after you play it. (You must still pay its Power cost.)

resolvedCard.name: Rhasa the Sunderer
resolvedCard.effect: I cost :rb_energy_1: less for each card in your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Teemo - Scout
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play me, give me +3 :rb_might: this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Tideturner
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play me, you may choose a unit you control at another location. Move me to its location and it to my original location.

resolvedCard.name: Traveling Merchant
resolvedCard.effect: When I move, discard 1, then draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Called Shot
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_rune_chaos: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Look at the top 2 cards of your Main Deck. Draw one and recycle the other.

resolvedCard.name: Fight or Flight
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Move a unit from a battlefield to its base.

resolvedCard.name: Guerilla Warfare
resolvedCard.effect: Return up to two cards with [Hidden] from your trash to your hand. You can hide cards ignoring costs this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Retreat
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Return a friendly unit to its owner's hand. Its owner channels 1 rune exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Singularity
resolvedCard.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

resolvedCard.name: Stacked Deck
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Look at the top 3 cards of your Main Deck. Put 1 into your hand and recycle the rest.

resolvedCard.name: Stupefy
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
Give a unit -1 :rb_might: this turn, to a minimum of 1 :rb_might:. Draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Switcheroo
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Swap the Might of two units at the same battlefield this turn.

resolvedCard.name: Time Warp
resolvedCard.effect: Take a turn after this one. Banish this.

resolvedCard.name: Wages of Pain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.

resolvedCard.name: Edge of Night
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
When you play this from face down, attach it to a unit you control (here).
[Equip] :rb_rune_chaos: (:rb_rune_chaos:: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Last Rites
resolvedCard.effect: [Equip] — :rb_rune_chaos:, Recycle 2 cards from your trash (Pay the cost: Attach this to a unit you control.)

resolvedCard.name: Scrapheap
resolvedCard.effect: When this is played, discarded, or killed, draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Seal of Discord
resolvedCard.effect: :rb_exhaust:: [Reaction] — [Add] :rb_rune_chaos:. (Abilities that add resources can't be reacted to.)

resolvedCard.name: Bandle Tree
resolvedCard.effect: You may hide an additional card here.

resolvedCard.name: Obelisk of Power
resolvedCard.effect: At the start of each player's first Beginning Phase, that player channels 1 rune.

resolvedCard.name: Zaun Warrens
resolvedCard.effect: When you conquer here, discard 1, then draw 1.

resolvedCard.name: Bellows Breath
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_1::rb_rune_mind: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Deal 1 to up to three units at the same location.

resolvedCard.name: Downwell
resolvedCard.effect: Return all units and gear to their owners' hands.

resolvedCard.name: Dr. Mundo - Expert
resolvedCard.effect:
My Might is increased by the number of cards in your trash.
At the start of your Beginning Phase, recycle 3 from your trash.

resolvedCard.name: Hard Bargain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Reaction] (Play any time, even before spells and abilities resolve.)
[Repeat] :rb_energy_2: (You may pay the additional cost to repeat this spell's effect.)
Counter a spell unless its controller pays :rb_energy_2:.

resolvedCard.name: Rebuke
resolvedCard.effect:
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Return a unit at a battlefield to its owner's hand.

resolvedCard.name: Singularity
resolvedCard.effect: Deal 6 to each of up to two units.

resolvedCard.name: Unchecked Power
resolvedCard.effect: Exhaust all friendly units, then deal 12 to ALL units at battlefields.

resolvedCard.name: Wages of Pain
resolvedCard.effect:
[Hidden] (Hide now for :rb_rune_rainbow: to react with later for :rb_energy_0:.)
[Action] (Play on your turn or in showdowns.)
Deal 3 to a unit at a battlefield. Play a Gold gear token exhausted.
